nodes.name: Day 1
nodes.description: Day with: St. Lawrence Market, CN Tower, Queen Street Warehouse
nodes.premise: Day: Day 1 - Day with: St. Lawrence Market, CN Tower, Queen Street Warehouse

nodes.name: St. Lawrence Market
nodes.description: Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.
nodes.premise: POI: St. Lawrence Market - Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.

nodes.name: CN Tower
nodes.description: Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.
nodes.premise: POI: CN Tower - Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.

nodes.name: Queen Street Warehouse
nodes.description: Budget-friendly comfort food in a lively setting with a diverse menu.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Queen Street Warehouse - Budget-friendly comfort food in a lively setting with a diverse menu.

nodes.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
nodes.description: Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.
nodes.premise: POI: Art Gallery of Ontario - Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.

nodes.name: Buca Yorkville
nodes.description: Upscale Italian dining featuring traditional dishes with a modern twist.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Buca Yorkville - Upscale Italian dining featuring traditional dishes with a modern twist.

nodes.name: The Rex Hotel Jazz & Blues Bar
nodes.description: Live jazz performances in a cozy, iconic Toronto venue.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: The Rex Hotel Jazz & Blues Bar - Live jazz performances in a cozy, iconic Toronto venue.

nodes.name: Day 2
nodes.description: Day with: Pow Wow Cafe, Royal Ontario Museum, Annona Restaurant
nodes.premise: Day: Day 2 - Day with: Pow Wow Cafe, Royal Ontario Museum, Annona Restaurant

nodes.name: Pow Wow Cafe
nodes.description: Indigenous-inspired brunch featuring bannock tacos in Kensington Market.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Pow Wow Cafe - Indigenous-inspired brunch featuring bannock tacos in Kensington Market.

nodes.name: Royal Ontario Museum
nodes.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.
nodes.premise: POI: Royal Ontario Museum - World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.

nodes.name: Annona Restaurant
nodes.description: Sophisticated international cuisine in a bright, modern setting.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Annona Restaurant - Sophisticated international cuisine in a bright, modern setting.

nodes.name: Casa Loma
nodes.description: Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.
nodes.premise: POI: Casa Loma - Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.

nodes.name: DaiLo
nodes.description: Modern Asian-Canadian fusion cuisine with creative flavors.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: DaiLo - Modern Asian-Canadian fusion cuisine with creative flavors.

nodes.name: Rivoli
nodes.description: Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.
nodes.premise: POI: Rivoli - Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.

nodes.name: Day 3
nodes.description: Day with: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse, Toronto Islands, Amsterdam BrewHouse
nodes.premise: Day: Day 3 - Day with: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse, Toronto Islands, Amsterdam BrewHouse

nodes.name: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse
nodes.description: Hearty breakfast featuring smoked meats and classic comfort food.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse - Hearty breakfast featuring smoked meats and classic comfort food.

nodes.name: Toronto Islands
nodes.description: Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.
nodes.premise: POI: Toronto Islands - Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.

nodes.name: Amsterdam BrewHouse
nodes.description: Lakeside pub offering local craft beers and hearty meals.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Amsterdam BrewHouse - Lakeside pub offering local craft beers and hearty meals.

nodes.name: Distillery District
nodes.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.
nodes.premise: POI: Distillery District - Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.

nodes.name: Cluny Bistro
nodes.description: French-inspired bistro serving classic and modern dishes.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Cluny Bistro - French-inspired bistro serving classic and modern dishes.

nodes.name: Jazz Bistro
nodes.description: Renowned jazz club with intimate setting and excellent acoustics.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Jazz Bistro - Renowned jazz club with intimate setting and excellent acoustics.

nodes.name: Day 4
nodes.description: Day with: Lady Marmalade, High Park, Mildred's Temple Kitchen
nodes.premise: Day: Day 4 - Day with: Lady Marmalade, High Park, Mildred's Temple Kitchen

nodes.name: Lady Marmalade
nodes.description: Popular brunch spot in Leslieville with creative dishes and excellent coffee.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Lady Marmalade - Popular brunch spot in Leslieville with creative dishes and excellent coffee.

nodes.name: High Park
nodes.description: Toronto's largest public park featuring hiking trails, a zoo, and cherry blossoms in spring.
nodes.premise: POI: High Park - Toronto's largest public park featuring hiking trails, a zoo, and cherry blossoms in spring.

nodes.name: Mildred's Temple Kitchen
nodes.description: Beloved Liberty Village restaurant known for comfort food and stunning space.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Mildred's Temple Kitchen - Beloved Liberty Village restaurant known for comfort food and stunning space.

nodes.name: Graffiti Alley
nodes.description: Vibrant street art corridor in the Fashion District showcasing local and international artists.
nodes.premise: POI: Graffiti Alley - Vibrant street art corridor in the Fashion District showcasing local and international artists.

nodes.name: Spadina Museum
nodes.description: Historic house museum showcasing early 20th-century Toronto life with period furnishings.
nodes.premise: POI: Spadina Museum - Historic house museum showcasing early 20th-century Toronto life with period furnishings.

nodes.name: Canoe Restaurant
nodes.description: Fine dining with stunning 54th-floor views and refined Canadian cuisine.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Canoe Restaurant - Fine dining with stunning 54th-floor views and refined Canadian cuisine.

nodes.name: Nathan Phillips Square
nodes.description: Iconic city square featuring the Toronto sign, reflecting pool, and evening atmosphere.
nodes.premise: POI: Nathan Phillips Square - Iconic city square featuring the Toronto sign, reflecting pool, and evening atmosphere.

nodes.name: Day 5
nodes.description: Day with: Carousel Bakery, Harbourfront Centre, Pai Northern Thai Kitchen
nodes.premise: Day: Day 5 - Day with: Carousel Bakery, Harbourfront Centre, Pai Northern Thai Kitchen

nodes.name: Carousel Bakery
nodes.description: Famous St. Lawrence Market stall serving Toronto's signature peameal bacon sandwich.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Carousel Bakery - Famous St. Lawrence Market stall serving Toronto's signature peameal bacon sandwich.

nodes.name: Harbourfront Centre
nodes.description: Waterfront cultural hub with galleries, performances, and lake views.
nodes.premise: POI: Harbourfront Centre - Waterfront cultural hub with galleries, performances, and lake views.

nodes.name: Pai Northern Thai Kitchen
nodes.description: Acclaimed Thai restaurant serving authentic Northern Thai dishes.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Pai Northern Thai Kitchen - Acclaimed Thai restaurant serving authentic Northern Thai dishes.

nodes.name: Hockey Hall of Fame
nodes.description: Shrine to Canada's national sport with Stanley Cup, memorabilia, and interactive exhibits.
nodes.premise: POI: Hockey Hall of Fame - Shrine to Canada's national sport with Stanley Cup, memorabilia, and interactive exhibits.

nodes.name: Eaton Centre
nodes.description: Iconic downtown shopping mall with flagship stores and stunning architecture.
nodes.premise: POI: Eaton Centre - Iconic downtown shopping mall with flagship stores and stunning architecture.

nodes.name: Richmond Station
nodes.description: Farm-to-table restaurant in a historic building, Top Chef Canada winner.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: Richmond Station - Farm-to-table restaurant in a historic building, Top Chef Canada winner.

nodes.name: C'est What
nodes.description: Cozy basement pub featuring Ontario craft beers and live music.
nodes.premise: Restaurant: C'est What - Cozy basement pub featuring Ontario craft beers and live music.
